name: Obsidian Note Exporter
description: Save and export notes through the local Obsidian Note Exporter Flask server.

open-extension-popup.description: Open the Obsidian Note Exporter popup

save-selection-to-queue-shortcut.description: Save highlighted text or the current page link to the queue

export-selection-direct-shortcut.description: Export highlighted text or the current page link to the selected Obsidian note

summarize-selection-or-page-shortcut.description: Summarize highlighted text or the current page in the extension popup
